mapper.insert:
SELECT USERS_SEQ.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO USERS ( USER_ID, EMAIL, PASSWORD_HASH, STATUS, NAME, PHONE, ROLE, REG_DT, MOD_DT, PROFILE_FILE_ID ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{email}, #{passwordHash}, #{status}, #{name}, #{phone}, 'USER', SYSDATE, SYSDATE, #{profileFileId, jdbcType=NUMERIC} )
